data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Both requirements fully implemented and tested. (1) Agent outcome stats captured as JSONL in .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.jsonl with AgentOutcomeRecord tracking per-iteration agent identity, exit codes, state transitions, rollback status, and computed success classification (success = exit 0 AND beat moved to next or prior queue state). Concurrent session safety via atomic appendFile. (2) Error exit handling: non-zero exit triggers enforceQueueTerminalInvariant rollback of action states, then retry with different agent via strict pool exclusion; terminates when no alternative agent available. 26 tests pass across 4 test files covering all edge cases.
